How To Edit Viral YouTube Shorts Using AI | Best Ai Video Editor
Try Submagic 👉 https://bit.ly/3WJXj9X use "dankieft90" for a discount

In this video I show you exactly how to edit youtube shorts using AI. for this I'm using the best AI video editor available that is called Submagic.

With Submagic AI you can edit short form content in a hearbeat. You can edit hormozi style captions in less than 5 minutes. Besides that with Submagic you can edit your youtube short by trimming it, adding broll, captions and transitions all in one platform.

Check out these videos to learn how to edit like your favorite youtubers using Submagic AI
